title: World Bundle Schemas
description: Canonical JSON schemas for the Frozen World Bundle. Covers world_manifest.json, bundle_hashes.json, and asset_pools.json. Content-independent — no game-system-specific vocabulary in field names.

WorldManifest.title: WorldManifest
WorldManifest.description: World identity, compile certificate, and integrity root. Presence of this file signals a valid, complete bundle.

world_id.description: Deterministic world identity: sha256(world_seed + content_pack_id + toolchain_pins_hash)[:32]

world_name.description: Generated world name from lexicon (human-readable, for UX)

compile_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 compile time. UX only — EXCLUDED from hash computation and determinism checks.

toolchain_pins.description: Frozen versions of all tools used during compilation

content_pack_id.description: Identifier of the content pack used as input

content_pack_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input content pack (for reproducibility verification)

root_hash.description: SHA-256 root hash of all bundle file hashes (deterministic bundle identity)

file_count.description: Total number of files in the bundle (for quick integrity check)

world_theme_brief.description: Copy of the world theme brief used for compilation (for provenance)

ToolchainPins.title: ToolchainPins
ToolchainPins.description: Pinned versions of all tools used during compilation. No 'latest' allowed.

llm_temperature.description: LLM temperature setting (0.0 for deterministic generation)

hash_algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for all integrity checks

schema_version.description: Bundle schema version this toolchain targets

image_gen_model_id.description: Image generation model ID (if used during compilation)

SeedSet.title: SeedSet
SeedSet.description: All seeds used during world compilation. Primary seed derives all others.

bestiary_seed.description: Derived seed for creature detail generation

asset_seed.description: Derived seed for asset pool initialization

doctrine_seed.description: Derived seed for doctrine profile generation

rulebook_seed.description: Derived seed for rulebook text generation

BundleHashes.title: BundleHashes
BundleHashes.description: Per-file SHA-256 hashes and root bundle hash for integrity verification.

root_hash.description: SHA-256 of sorted concatenation of all file hashes

files.description: Map of relative file path → SHA-256 hash

AssetPools.title: AssetPools
AssetPools.description: Asset category definitions, pool sizes, and binding rules for this world.

categories.description: Asset categories defined for this world

binding_rules.description: Rules for binding assets to entities

permanent_bind_types.description: Asset types that permanently bind to an entity (e.g., 'npc_portrait', 'voice_profile')

category_bind_types.description: Asset types that bind to a category, not an individual (e.g., 'creature_token_style')

no_reuse.description: If true, no two entities may share the same permanently-bound asset

fallback_policy.description: What to do when an asset pool is empty

strategy.description: Fallback strategy when pool is exhausted

AssetCategory.title: AssetCategory
AssetCategory.description: A single asset category with target pool size.

asset_type.description: Type of asset in this category

target_pool_size.description: Target number of assets to maintain in this pool

generation_prompt_template.description: Template for generating new assets in this category

CompileReport.title: CompileReport
CompileReport.description: Compile status report. Always written, even on failure.

validation_results.description: Schema validation results for generated artifacts

LexiconEntry.title: LexiconEntry
LexiconEntry.description: A single name mapping from content pack ID to world-flavored name.

short_description.description: One-line description for lists and indices

description: This schema file defines types used across the world bundle. Individual bundle files reference these definitions. The primary validation targets are world_manifest.json (§WorldManifest), bundle_hashes.json (§BundleHashes), and asset_pools.json (§AssetPools).
